decisions.briefing: Markets are sharply lower today with NASDAQ down 4.2% and S&P 500 down 2.6% — a meaningful risk-off session. The screener returned zero candidates, confirming conditions are too volatile for new entries. Holding all six existing positions and letting the automatic stop-loss system act as our backstop if any position deteriorates further.

market_education.summary_en: Today's session saw broad-based selling across equities, with growth and technology stocks bearing the brunt of the decline as investors rotated out of risk assets. NASDAQ's 4.2% drop signals elevated concern around rate expectations, earnings guidance risk, or macro data — each of which can trigger institutional de-risking and force liquidations in leveraged positions. When both large-cap (S&P 500 -2.6%) and growth indices fall sharply in tandem, it reflects a systemic flight to safety rather than sector rotation.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日美股全線重挫，科技與成長股跌幅尤為明顯，那斯達克指數單日下跌4.2%，反映市場對利率前景、企業盈利展望或宏觀數據的憂慮升溫，觸發機構投資者大規模去槓桿。標普500亦同步下跌2.6%，顯示此輪跌勢並非單純板塊輪動，而是市場整體風險偏好急劇收縮、資金集體撤離風險資產的避險訊號。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-off' day is when investors collectively sell higher-risk assets like growth stocks and move into safer ones like bonds, gold, or cash. It usually happens when fear spikes — from bad economic data, geopolitical events, or just a sudden shift in market sentiment. Today's NASDAQ drop of over 4% is a textbook risk-off session: the screener found zero viable candidates because momentum has reversed across the board.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「避險模式」（Risk-Off）是指投資者集體拋售成長股等高風險資產，轉向債券、黃金或現金等避風港的市場狀態。這通常由經濟數據惡化、地緣政治風險或市場情緒驟變所引發。今日那斯達克大跌逾4%，是典型的避險行情——選股系統今天未能篩選出任何合適標的，正是因為市場整體動能已全面逆轉。
